metric_constraint_keys: <name>: scalar baseline value (informational only when paired with _tolerance)
<name>_tolerance: absolute symmetric tolerance band; outside is REGRESSED unless _regression_threshold is also set
<name>_floor: observed must be >= floor; below is REGRESSED
<name>_regression_threshold: absolute deviation that flips REGRESSED (combine with _tolerance for WARN tier)

iter7_to_8_grouped_union._PLACEHOLDER: Will be filled with measured values from the in-flight iter7-to-8 run.

source_runs: PLACEHOLDER - will be set after first measured run completes.
